- Removed Drag cropping from the timeline
- Undo now works when changing rotation and scale in the clip editor
- you can now rename clips 
- Deleting clips in app is much more optimized
- Modernized the start clipping on startup toggle for the rest of the UI
- Modernized the scroll bar 
- Enlarged DualClip text
- Fixed clip library clipping bug
- Fixed the clip library layoute
